title.zh: 经络养生：十二经络疏通方法与保健技巧
title.en: Meridian Wellness: 12 Meridians Cleansing & Health Techniques

description.zh: 深入了解人体十二经络系统，掌握经络疏通方法，通过按摩、拍打等方式促进气血流通
description.en: Deep understanding of the 12-meridian system, master meridian cleansing techniques

zh.text: 经络是人体气血运行的通道，连接五脏六腑和四肢百骸。保持经络通畅是中医养生的重要方法。通过按摩、拍打、艾灸等方式疏通经络，可以促进气血流通，达到防病治病的目的。
经络是人体内部的能量通道系统，包括十二经脉、奇经八脉等。十二经脉是经络系统的主体，它们对称分布在人体两侧，连接着脏腑和体表。

items: 起始于中焦，终止于拇指
主治：咳嗽、气喘、胸闷
常用穴位：列缺、太渊、鱼际
起始于食指，终止于鼻翼旁
主治：便秘、腹泻、咽喉肿痛
常用穴位：合谷、曲池、迎香
起始于鼻翼旁，终止于足次趾
主治：胃痛、腹胀、消化不良
常用穴位：足三里、内庭、丰隆
起始于足大趾，终止于舌下
主治：腹胀、便溏、乏力
常用穴位：三阴交、阴陵泉、太白
起始于心中，终止于小指
主治：心悸、失眠、胸闷
常用穴位：神门、少海、少冲
起始于小指，终止于耳前
主治：耳鸣、耳聋、肩背痛
常用穴位：后溪、养老、听宫
起始于目内眦，终止于足小趾
主治：头痛、腰痛、感冒
常用穴位：风门、肺俞、肾俞
起始于足小趾，终止于舌根
主治：腰膝酸软、耳鸣、尿频
常用穴位：涌泉、太溪、复溜
起始于胸中，终止于中指
主治：心烦、失眠、胸闷
常用穴位：内关、大陵、劳宫
起始于无名指，终止于眉梢
主治：耳鸣、耳聋、偏头痛
常用穴位：中渚、外关、翳风
起始于目外眦，终止于足四趾
主治：头痛、口苦、胁痛
常用穴位：风池、肩井、阳陵泉
起始于足大趾，终止于头顶
主治：易怒、头痛、月经不调
常用穴位：太冲、行间、期门

zh.text: 用手掌或指腹沿着经络走向进行按摩，可以促进气血流通。按摩时力度要适中，以感觉酸胀为宜。
用手掌或拍打工具拍打经络，可以有效疏通堵塞的经络。拍打时要注意力度，避免受伤。
艾灸是传统的经络调理方法，通过温热刺激穴位，起到温通经络、驱寒祛湿的作用。
刮痧可以有效排出经络中的瘀滞，促进气血运行。刮痧后要注意保暖，避免受凉。

items: 用手指从下巴向上提拉至太阳穴
用食指和中指从鼻旁推至太阳穴
用拇指按揉太阳穴
用梳子或手指梳理头发
用拇指按揉风池穴
用手掌拍打头顶
按摩手臂内侧（心包经、心经）
拍打大腿外侧（胆经）
按揉小腿（脾经、肝经）
饭后1小时内不宜进行剧烈按摩
按摩时要保持放松的心态
力度要适中，避免损伤皮肤
身体虚弱时不宜过度疏通
孕妇、经期妇女要避免某些穴位

zh.text: 温馨提示：经络养生是一种辅助保健方法，不能替代专业医疗。如果有严重疾病，请及时就医。按摩时如出现不适，应立即停止。

en.text: Meridians are the pathways for Qi and Blood circulation in the body, connecting internal organs with limbs. Keeping meridians unobstructed is essential for TCM wellness. Techniques like massage, tapping, and moxibustion can clear meridians and promote Qi flow.

Meridians are the body's energy channel system, including the 12 Regular Meridians and 8 Extraordinary Vessels. The 12 Regular Meridians form the core, symmetrically distributed and connecting organs to the body surface.

items: Begins at middle burner, ends at thumb
Treats: cough, asthma, chest congestion
Key points: Lieque, Taiyuan, Yuji
Begins at index finger, ends at nose
Treats: constipation, diarrhea, sore throat
Key points: Hegu, Quchi, Yingxiang
Begins at nose, ends at second toe
Treats: stomach pain, bloating, indigestion
Key points: Zusanli, Neiting, Fenglong
Begins at big toe, ends under tongue
Treats: bloating, loose stool, fatigue
Key points: Sanyinjiao, Yinlingquan, Taibai
Begins at heart, ends at little finger
Treats: palpitations, insomnia, chest tightness
Key points: Shenmen, Shaohai, Shaochong
Begins at little finger, ends at ear
Treats: tinnitus, deafness, shoulder pain
Key points: Houxi, Yanglao, Tinggong
Begins at inner eye, ends at small toe
Treats: headache, back pain, colds
Key points: Fengmen, Feishu, Shenshu
Begins at small toe, ends at tongue
Treats: back pain, tinnitus, frequent urination
Key points: Yongquan, Taixi, Fuliu
Begins at chest, ends at middle finger
Treats: anxiety, insomnia, chest tightness
Key points: Neiguan, Daling, Laogong
Begins at ring finger, ends at eyebrow
Treats: tinnitus, deafness, migraine
Key points: Zhongzhu, Waiguan, Yifeng
Begins at outer eye, ends at 4th toe
Treats: headache, bitter taste, rib pain
Key points: Fengchi, Jianjing, Yanglingquan
Begins at big toe, ends at top of head
Treats: irritability, headache, menstrual issues
Key points: Taichong, Xingjian, Qimen

en.text: Use palm or fingertips to massage along meridian pathways. Apply moderate pressure until a comfortable soreness is felt.
Use palm or tapping tool to tap along meridians. This effectively clears obstructions. Control force to avoid injury.
Traditional moxibustion warms acupoints, promoting meridian circulation and dispelling cold/dampness.
Gua Sha effectively removes stagnation and promotes Qi flow. Stay warm after treatment to avoid cold invasion.

items: Gently lift from chin to temples
Push from nose sides to temples
Massage temples with thumbs
Comb hair with comb or fingers
Massage Fengchi points
Pat top of head with palms
Massage inner arms (Pericardium, Heart)
Tap outer thighs (Gallbladder)
Massage calves (Spleen, Liver)
Avoid intense massage within 1 hour after meals
Stay relaxed during treatment
Use moderate pressure to avoid skin damage
Avoid over-cleansing when weak
Pregnant women should avoid certain points

en.text: Note: Meridian wellness is complementary care, not a substitute for professional medical treatment. Consult a doctor for serious health issues. Stop immediately if discomfort occurs.
